sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { api, Event } from '../services/api.ts'; const Events: React.FC = () => { const [events, setEvents] = useState([]); const [filter, setFilter] = useState('all'); const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ event_id: '', first_name: '', last_name: '', email: '', phone: '', alu_id: '', dietary_restrictions: '', additional_guests: 0, comments: '' }); useEffect(() => { api.getEvents().then(setEvents).catch(console.error); }, []); const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => { e.preventDefault(); console.log('RSVP submitted:', formData); // Reset form setFormData({ event_id: '', first_name: '', last_name: '', email: '', phone: '', alu_id: '', dietary_restrictions: '', additional_guests: 0, comments: '' }); }; const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const upcomingEvents = events.filter(event => new Date(event.date) >= new Date()); const pastEvents = events.filter(event => new Date(event.date) < new Date()); return (
{/* Page Banner */}

Events

Join us for cultural celebrations, academic workshops, and community gatherings

{/* Events Filter */}
{/* Upcoming Events */} {(filter === 'all' || filter === 'upcoming') && (

Upcoming Events

{upcomingEvents.length > 0 ? ( upcomingEvents.map((event, index) => (
{new Date(event.date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short' }).toUpperCase()} {new Date(event.date).getDate()} {new Date(event.date).getFullYear()}

{event.title}

{new Date(event.date).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit', hour12: true })}

{event.location}

{event.description}

RSVP Now Add to Calendar
)) ) : (

No upcoming events scheduled at the moment. Check back soon!

)}
)} {/* Past Events */} {(filter === 'all' || filter === 'past') && (

Past Events

{pastEvents.length > 0 ? ( pastEvents.map((event, index) => (
{new Date(event.date).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short' }).toUpperCase()} {new Date(event.date).getDate()} {new Date(event.date).getFullYear()}

{event.title}

{new Date(event.date).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit', hour12: true })}

{event.location}

{event.description}

View Photos
)) ) : (

No past events available. Check back after some events!

)}
)} {/* Event Gallery */}

Event Gallery

Highlights from our past events and activities

{[ { title: "Cultural Night 2023", image: "/assets/images/event1.jpg", description: "Celebrating South Sudanese culture" }, { title: "Academic Workshop", image: "/assets/images/event2.jpg", description: "Skills development session" }, { title: "Community Outreach", image: "/assets/images/event3.jpg", description: "Giving back to the community" }, { title: "Leadership Summit", image: "/assets/images/event4.jpg", description: "Developing future leaders" }, { title: "Alumni Reunion", image: "/assets/images/event5.jpg", description: "Connecting with graduates" }, { title: "Sports Tournament", image: "/assets/images/event6.jpg", description: "Friendly competition" } ].map((item, index) => (

{item.title}

{item.description}

))}
{/* RSVP Form */}

RSVP for an Event

Please fill out the form below to register for an upcoming event
